question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between Washington Wizards and Golden State Warriors on 2026-03-27?
question.context: Washington Wizards (17-55) at Golden State Warriors (35-38). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: NBA games typically average around 220-230 total points. The Warriors play at a moderate pace at Chase Center, averaging around 115 points per game this season. The Wizards are a poor team (17-55) but still score and allow points at league-average or slightly below rates. Golden State tends to play uptempo and this matchup against a weak defensive team could push scoring slightly higher. The Wizards have poor defense, which could inflate scoring. Accounting for typical NBA total scoring distributions with a slight lean toward higher scoring given Washington's defensive deficiencies, I estimate 228 total points as the central estimate. Confidence intervals reflect the natural variance in NBA game totals, which typically range from around 200 to 260 in most games.
